title: Fix invisible input fields and form elements

requirements.text: Fix all input fields, textareas, and select elements across all form section components (PersonalInfoSection, EducationSection, ExperienceSection, SkillsSection, ProjectsSection, CertificationsSection, ProfilePhotoSection) so they are always visually distinct and legible regardless of hover or focus state. Each field must have a consistently visible border, a non-transparent background that contrasts with the page background, and readable text color at all times — not just on hover.

quotes: when i get my mouse arrow to the box it is visible when i move from it its again invisible
The input fields are only visible on hover (when your mouse is over them) and turn invisible when you move away

acceptanceCriteria: All input fields, textareas, and selects display a visible border at rest (no hover required)
All input fields, textareas, and selects have a non-transparent background color that contrasts with the surrounding page background
Text entered in any field is readable without hovering
Placeholder text is visible at rest
Hover and focus states may add additional styling (e.g., highlight ring) but the field must remain visible when neither hovered nor focused
The fix applies consistently across all form sections and both light and dark theme color tokens defined in index.css

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Preserve the existing glowing blue section title effect defined in frontend/src/index.css
nonGoals: Redesigning the overall layout or color theme
Adding new form fields or resume sections
Changing backend data models or storage logic
